title: Stop littering
body:
Don't touch the test source dir (I missed one in #3841).

Signed-off-by: Ed Santiago <santiago@redhat.com>

comments.body:
This was probably done by me.  I make this mistake all the time.

LGTM
I didn't `git blame`, and see no reason to. It seems impossible *not* to make the mistake, given the similarity between `TESTDIR` and `TESTSDIR`.
